zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Douglas於1442年4月2日出生在蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，她的父親George Douglas30歲，母親Elizabeth Sibbald24歲。她於1459年6月2日與Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton在蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年5月2日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉享年36歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Douglas于1442年4月2日出生在苏格兰培爾培斯时，她的父亲George Douglas30岁，母亲Elizabeth Sibbald24岁。她于1459年6月2日与Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton在苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年5月2日在苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉享年36岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Douglas was born on 2 April 1442, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, George Douglas, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Sibbald, was 24. She married Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton on 2 June 1459, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 2 May 1478, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 36, and was buried in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Douglas est née le 2 avril 1442, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, George Douglas, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sibbald, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton le 2 juin 1459, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 mai 1478, à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Douglas am 2. April 1442 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Douglas 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Sibbald 24. Sie hat am 2. Juni 1459 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Mai 1478 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Douglas è nata il il 2 aprile 1442 nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, George Douglas, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Sibbald, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton il 2 giugno 1459, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 maggio 1478, nel Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Douglasが1442年4月2日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた時，父George Douglasは30歳，母Elizabeth Sibbaldは24歳であった。1459年6月2日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでSir John Wallace 12th of Riccartonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年5月2日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジで36歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Douglas(이)가 1442년 4월 2일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Douglas(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Sibbald(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1459년 6월 2일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 5월 2일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Douglas nasceu em 2 de abril de 1442, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, George Douglas, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Sibbald, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton em 2 de junho de 1459, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de maio de 1478, em Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Douglas родилась 2 апреля 1442 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени George Douglas было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sibbald, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Wallace 12th of Riccarton 2 июня 1459 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 2 мая 1478 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия.
